Store_Name: The name of the store including its location. This is related to the insight as it specifies the store for which the waste data is provided.
Quarter: The specific quarter of the year. This is related to the insight as it specifies the time period for the waste data.
Year: The specific year. This is related to the insight as it specifies the time period for the waste data.
Waste_Generated: The amount of waste generated by the store in tons. This is the primary data point in the insight.
